body_txt: When a girl (or, occasionally, a sufficiently Bishōnen boy) has been upset and runs off while crying, the same mechanism responsible for Ocular Gushers ejects her tears with sufficient force that they become a visible trail in the air behind her, each one sparkling like a gem. A Sub-Trope of Everything's Better with Sparkles , the tendency in fiction to add sparkles to beautify stuff. Sister Trope of Rain Aura , another case of water (vapor) being represented as a glowing, white mist or faint outline. Compare Tender Tears , Beautiful Tears . Contrast Inelegant Blubbering , Single Tear .
